title: Junior Business Development Manager at Smartworks

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Smartworks
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!
